name: onmyagent-orchestrator
description: OnMyAgent host orchestrator for opencode + OnMyAgent server

scripts.build:bin:all: node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && bun ./script/build.ts --outdir dist/bin --filename onmyagent --target bun-darwin-arm64 --target bun-darwin-x64 --target bun-linux-x64 --target bun-linux-arm64 --target bun-windows-x64
scripts.build:bin:bundled: node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && node ../desktop/scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs --outdir dist && bun ./script/build.ts --outdir dist --filename onmyagent && bun scripts/build-bin.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "console.error('onmyagent-orchestrator is published via apps/orchestrator/scripts/publish-npm.mjs (meta + platform packages)'); process.exit(1);"
